name: W13 Morning Flow — Bodyweight Spine + Hip (All Days, Deload-Week Variety)
description: 15 min bodyweight floor flow — **universal W13 morning flow, used every training day** (Mon push / Tue KB / Wed pull / Thu KB / Fri legs). Same three-part shape as W11/W12 with rotated moves for variety. Morning flows are already low-fatigue, so they stay unchanged in intensity through the deload — only the move selection rotates. Three-part: spine primer → bodyweight work → deep stretch arc. Day-specific therapeutic add-on at the end (push = pec-minor protocol; pull = dead hang + scap pull; legs = pigeon + supine twist + the new cross-leg lateral lean; KB days skip — banded prep covers it).

sets.name: Primer — Wake the Spine (~3 min)

exercises.notes: Slow, full ROM each direction. Spine wave wakes the segment-by-segment articulation.
30s each side. Thoracic rotation + shoulder opener — reach a little further each week.
Gentle spinal extension — counters the all-day desk flexion. **Replaces W12's puppy-pose** in the primer; the extension wakes the back line.

sets.notes: Spine extension swaps in for the lat-stretch opener — variety on the same wake-the-spine intent.

sets.name: Work Block — Bodyweight Activation (~5 min)

exercises.notes: Slow walkouts — hamstring load on the way out, plank on the way in. **Rotates back in** (W11 had it) — full-body warm in one shape.
45s alternating. Plank with opposite arm + leg extension — anti-rotation. **Rotates back in** — different anti-rotation pattern than W12's shoulder taps.
45s alternating. From down-dog, draw one knee toward the forehead, hold a beat, switch. **Stays** — the core+hip+shoulder integration earns its place.
45s slow. **Stays** — durable hip opener under plank load.
30s each side. **Stays** — the windmill on the floor, the lateral-hinge cue translation.

sets.notes: Inchworm + bird-dog rotate back in for variety. Anti-rotation gets a different shape than W12.

sets.name: Yoga Flow — Deep Stretch Arc (~7 min)

exercises.notes: 30s each side. **Stays every week** — signature spine move.
30s each direction. Quadruped hip abduction — slow, full ROM.
30s each side. Hip flexor + adductor + back-leg quad. Drop to elbows if accessible. **Stays** — durable hip opener.
Bodyweight, slow. **Stays every week** — mirrors the Tuesday loaded cossack.
30s each side. Flowing entry into pigeon. **Replaces W12's static pigeon** — the flowing version for variety; the hip release still lands.
60s slow pulses. Adductor + hip opener. **Rotates back in** (W11 had it) — gentle pulsing release.

sets.notes: Continuous arc — flow between shapes, breathe deeply. Anchors stay (scorpion, cossack, lizard); pigeon + adductor work rotate for variety.

sets.name: 📍 Day-Specific Add-On — Pick by Today's Training (~3-5 min)

exercises.notes: **📍 PUSH DAYS — KEY PROTOCOL MOVE.** 30s each at LOW / MID / HIGH elbow positions. Arm bent 90°, forearm on the door frame, step through and rotate the torso AWAY. Desk work continuously re-tightens pec minor — daily.
**📍 PUSH DAYS** — active side of the pec-minor fix. Lower trap + rotator cuff.
**📍 PUSH DAYS** — serratus activation, helps unstick a tight pec minor.
**📍 PUSH DAYS (optional)** — slow rotator cuff work. Add if the shoulder feels off — worth doing this week with the right-shoulder cluster active.
**📍 PUSH DAYS (optional)** — pins the shoulder blades in the corrected position.
**📍 PULL DAYS** — 25s. Decompress the shoulders, warm the grip.
**📍 PULL DAYS** — scapulae retracting only, no elbow bend. Crisp scap engagement before loaded pulls.

**📍 LEGS DAYS — 🆕 NEW (W12D5 user discovery).** 30s each side. Scissor one foot over the other, reach the same-side arm overhead, lean away from the back leg — QL/psoas release. Do this before heading to the gym; it's also in the legs-workout warmup.
**📍 LEGS DAYS — W8 QL-SPASM PROTOCOL.** 90s each side. The long hold is what lets the QL/psoas release. **Non-negotiable on legs day.**
**📍 LEGS DAYS** — 60s each side. Gentle twist for the QL. Lacrosse-ball QL roll above the iliac crest beforehand if available.

sets.notes: **Pick today's day-specific protocol — push / pull / legs.** ~3-5 min total. KB days (Tue/Thu) skip this block — the in-workout banded prep covers the equivalent.

tips: **Same shape as W11/W12, rotated moves.** Morning flows are low-fatigue — they stay unchanged in intensity through the deload, only the move selection rotates.
**15 min main flow + 3-5 min day-specific add-on** — universal across W13 (Mon push / Tue KB / Wed pull / Thu KB / Fri legs).
**Scorpion + cossack BW + lizard pose stay every week** — durable spine + hip + adductor anchors.
Cobra, inchworm, bird-dog, mountain-to-pigeon, frog pulses rotate in this week for variety.
**🆕 Legs-day add-on now includes the standing cross-leg lateral lean** — the W12D5 QL/psoas release move, now official.
**Day-specific add-on at the end** — push days do the pec-minor protocol, pull days do dead hang + scap pull, legs days do the cross-leg lean + 90s pigeon + supine twist. KB days skip the add-on.
If short on time: scorpion + lizard + cossack BW + mountain-to-pigeon, plus today's day-specific add-on.
formPhilosophy: Same as W11/W12 — variety means different shapes hitting the same patterns. Scorpion-family spine work + hip openers + adductor stretches. Morning flows don't deload (they're already low-fatigue); they just rotate moves to stay interesting. Designed for home, structured around the in-workout banded prep's logic.
